understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile (+) without landing on spikes, using movement and block removal.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT causes horizontal movement and then automatic gravity-driven fall until landing on a solid tile, spike, or goal. CLICK removes a breakable block (x) at the specified coordinates. UNDO reverts the previous action. Landing on spikes (u, v) ends the run.

understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile (+) without landing on spikes, using movement and block removal.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT causes horizontal movement and then automatic gravity-driven fall until landing on a solid tile, spike, or goal.
